University of California, Berkeley, CA, USA 94720 December 15, 1999 ABSTRACT This paper examines current problems in the creation of embedded software and speculates about some promising research directions. Send comments to Edward A. Lee at eal@eec
ections. Send comments to Edward A. Lee at eal@eecs.berkeley.edu .
